title: dns-option ignored if dns-search is not set
body:
**Description**

setting --dns-option is ignored if dns-search is not also set

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
master branch
```

[This line](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/3fc7c4bc2bd3c5c105487e160b20356a0e8de46c/pkg/parse/parse.go#L104) seems to incorrectly check the default for --dns-search instead of dns-option. Found via coverity scan of OpenShift 4.6

comments.body:
Thanks I will open a PR.

Next time just open a PR to fix rather then an issue, if you feel comfortable.
